sentences.target: Die Organisation hilft heute in der Stadt.
sentences.reading: /diː ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn hɪlft ˈhɔʏtə ɪn deːɐ ʃtat/

translations.de: Die Organisation hilft heute in der Stadt.
translations.ipa: /diː ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn hɪlft ˈhɔʏtə ɪn deːɐ ʃtat/
translations.en: The organization is helping in the city today.
translations.es: La organización está ayudando en la ciudad hoy.
translations.it: Oggi l'organizzazione sta aiutando in città.
translations.ko: 오늘 단체가 시내에서 도움을 주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天这个组织在市中心提供帮助。
translations.yue: 呢個機構今日喺市中心幫手。
translations.pt: A organização está ajudando na cidade hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tổ chức đang hỗ trợ ở thành phố.
translations.nl: De organisatie helpt vandaag in de stad.
translations.hu: A szervezet ma a városban segít.
translations.hi: आज संगठन शहर में मदद कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ο οργανισμός σήμερα βοηθά στην πόλη.
translations.nb: Organisasjonen hjelper i byen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini organisasi membantu di kota.
translations.da: Organisationen hjælper i byen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は団体が市内で支援しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative determiner of 'Organisation' (marks the subject NP).
Common noun; feminine singular in nominative as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates the action of the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb ('hilft') indicating the time.
Preposition heading a locative PP; selects dative case in a static location context.
Definite article; feminine singular dative determiner within the PP headed by 'in'.
Common noun; feminine singular dative as the object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Meine Organisation zu Hause klappt inzwischen ganz gut.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn t͡suː ˈhaʊ̯zə klapt ɪnˈt͡svɪʃn̩ ɡant͡s ɡuːt/

translations.de: Meine Organisation zu Hause klappt inzwischen ganz gut.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn t͡suː ˈhaʊ̯zə klapt ɪnˈt͡svɪʃn̩ ɡant͡s ɡuːt/
translations.en: My household organization is working quite well now.
translations.es: Ya tengo la casa bastante bien organizada.
translations.fr: Mon organisation à la maison marche plutôt bien maintenant.
translations.it: A casa ormai è tutto abbastanza organizzato.
translations.ko: 이제 집 정리가 꽤 잘 되고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在家里收拾得挺不错了。
translations.ru: Дома у меня теперь всё неплохо организовано.
translations.pt: Agora tenho a casa bem organizada.
translations.tr: Ev düzenim artık oldukça iyi gidiyor.
translations.vi: Giờ việc sắp xếp ở nhà khá ổn rồi.
translations.ar: تنظيمي المنزلي يسير بشكل جيد الآن.
translations.nl: Mijn huishouden is inmiddels best goed georganiseerd.
translations.uk: У мене вдома тепер все досить добре організовано.
translations.hu: Otthon mostanra elég jól megy a rendszerezés.
translations.hi: अब घर की व्यवस्था काफी अच्छी चल रही है.
translations.pl: W domu mam teraz całkiem niezły porządek.
translations.el: Η οργάνωση στο σπίτι πάει πλέον αρκετά καλά.
translations.nb: Nå har jeg ganske god orden hjemme.
translations.id: Sekarang pengaturan di rumah berjalan cukup baik.
translations.sv: Nu har jag ganska bra ordning hemma.
translations.ro: Acum organizarea în casă merge destul de bine.
translations.cs: Organizace doma už funguje docela dobře.
translations.da: Organiseringen derhjemme fungerer efterhånden ret godt.
translations.fi: Kotona järjestelyt sujuvat nyt aika hyvin.
translations.ja: 今は家の片付けがけっこううまくいっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative marking possession of 'Organisation' (subject NP).
Common noun; feminine singular nominative as the subject.
Preposition; heads the fixed PP 'zu Hause' and selects dative.
Common noun; neuter singular dative (set phrase 'zu Hause'), functioning adverbially as a location.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive 'works out'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause ('by now/in the meantime').
Degree adverb intensifying 'gut'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'klappt'.

sentences.target: Wir suchen eine Organisation für das Festival.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən ˈaɪ̯nə ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn fyːɐ das ˈfɛstiˌvaːl/

translations.de: Wir suchen eine Organisation für das Festival.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən ˈaɪ̯nə ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn fyːɐ das ˈfɛstiˌvaːl/
translations.en: We are looking for an organization for the festival.
translations.es: Estamos buscando una organización para el festival.
translations.fr: Nous cherchons une organisation pour le festival.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un'organizzazione per il festival.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为节日寻找一个组织。
translations.yue: 我哋為個節日搵緊一個機構。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma organização para o festival.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một tổ chức cho lễ hội.
translations.nl: We zoeken een organisatie voor het festival.
translations.hi: हम त्योहार के लिए एक संगठन ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε έναν οργανισμό για το φεστιβάλ.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en organisasjon til festivalen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari organisasi untuk festival.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en organisation till festivalen.
translations.da: Vi søger en organisation til festivalen.
translations.ja: 私たちはフェスティバルのための団体を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative as the subject.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article; feminine singular accusative determiner of 'Organisation'.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative as the direct object of 'suchen'.
Preposition heading a PP; selects accusative case.
Definite article; neuter singular accusative within the PP headed by 'für'.
Common noun; neuter singular accusative as the object of 'für'.

sentences.target: Ihre Organisation wirkt im Alltag wirklich professionell.
sentences.reading: /ˈiːʁə ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn vɪʁkt ɪm ˈal.taːk ˈvɪʁklɪç pʁofɛsjoˈnɛl/

translations.de: Ihre Organisation wirkt im Alltag wirklich professionell.
translations.ipa: /ˈiːʁə ɔʁɡa.ni.zaˈt͡si̯oːn vɪʁkt ɪm ˈal.taːk ˈvɪʁklɪç pʁofɛsjoˈnɛl/
translations.en: Your organization seems really professional in everyday life.
translations.es: Su organización parece muy profesional en el día a día.
translations.fr: Votre organisation a l'air vraiment professionnelle au quotidien.
translations.it: La vostra organizzazione sembra davvero professionale nella vita di tutti i giorni.
translations.ko: 일상 업무에서 귀사의 운영은 정말 전문적으로 느껴져요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们的组织在日常工作中看起来很专业。
translations.yue: 你哋個機構喺日常運作上睇落好專業。
translations.ru: Ваша организация в повседневной работе выглядит очень профессионально.
translations.pt: A sua organização parece bem profissional no dia a dia.
translations.he: הארגון שלכם נראה מקצועי מאוד ביום יום.
translations.tr: Kuruluşunuz günlük işlerde gerçekten profesyonel görünüyor.
translations.vi: Tổ chức của bạn trông rất chuyên nghiệp trong công việc hằng ngày.
translations.ar: منظمتكم تبدو محترفة جدًا في العمل اليومي.
translations.nl: Jullie organisatie oogt heel professioneel in het dagelijks werk.
translations.uk: Ваша організація у повсякденній роботі виглядає справді професійно.
translations.hu: A szervezetük a mindennapokban nagyon profi benyomást kelt.
translations.hi: आपका संगठन रोज़मर्रा के काम में वाकई बहुत पेशेवर लगता है.
translations.pl: Wasza organizacja na co dzień wygląda naprawdę profesjonalnie.
translations.el: Ο οργανισμός σας δείχνει πολύ επαγγελματικός στην καθημερινή λειτουργία.
translations.nb: Organisasjonen deres virker veldig profesjonell i det daglige.
translations.id: Organisasi Anda terlihat sangat profesional dalam kegiatan sehari-hari.
translations.sv: Er organisation verkar väldigt professionell i det dagliga arbetet.
translations.ro: Organizația voastră pare foarte profesionistă în activitatea de zi cu zi.
translations.cs: Vaše organizace působí v každodenní práci opravdu пpoфecionálně.
translations.da: Jeres organisation virker virkelig professionel i det daglige.
translations.fi: Teidän organisaationne vaikuttaa arjessa todella ammattimaiselta.
translations.ja: 御社の組織は日常業務でもとてもプロフェッショナルに見えます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative marking possession of 'Organisation' (subject). Ambiguous (formal your / her / their).
Common noun; feminine singular nominative as the subject.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; copular-like usage ('seems/appears').
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); heads a PP and selects dative case.
Common noun; masculine singular dative as the object of 'im'.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate complement ('professionell').
Adjective used predicatively as a complement to 'wirkt' (describes the subject's quality).
